title: Island-Mode-72h-Stresstest / Island-Mode 72h Stress Test
description: Browser-based, bilingual (DE/EN) self-assessment: can a plant keep producing for 72 hours without office IT? Walks fourteen hidden dependencies where island operation fails in practice (directory services, DNS/NTP, MES/ERP order data, licence servers, label and dispatch printing, AV/EDR consoles, OEM support paths, restore tooling, telephony and alerting, process data buffering, manual operation skills, offline documentation, physical access, consumable reserves). Yields a verdict (island-capable / degraded / halt after x hours), a printable island-mode profile sheet per plant and an action list prioritised by hours-to-impact, exportable as CSV; optional downtime cost per hour to express the risk in euros. Companion to the book 'ISMS für die Industrie' (Springer Vieweg, 2026), ch. 24.3.
